{"first_name": "Alexander", "last_name": "Villamizar", "full_name": "Alexander Villamizar", "headline": "Operational Leader in Freight Factoring | Specializing in Process Optimization, Risk Management, and Team Development", "title": "Chief Operating Officer", "picture": {"source": "https://images.ai-ark.com/m7qUjhat7h4KZt-fgkgbQJROisj1ys8_dAD3BOiltAs/exp:1780358399/rs:fill:80:80/plain/s3://ark-person/images/aab38a2b-08a7-4554-f6ed-e57b9ea49fca.jpg"}, "background": null, "birth_date": null, "summary": "As a Chief Operating Officer (COO) with over seven years of experience in the financial services industry, I excel in designing and implementing operational processes that enhance efficiency and drive excellence. I lead and supervise multidisciplinary teams across various areas, including Underwriting, Onboarding, Audit, Verification, Customer Service, and Collections.

My expertise includes:

Operational Leadership: Ensuring daily operations run smoothly by overseeing objectives and guaranteeing that all systems, departments, and parts of the operational chain function correctly.

Risk Management: Managing and mitigating operational, credit portfolio, and fraud risks to secure the organization's profitability and sustainability.

Credit Policy Establishment: Defining and enforcing credit policies aligned with strategic goals and regulatory requirements.

Resource Optimization: Controlling and optimizing human, financial, and technological resources to boost productivity and foster growth.

Strategic Partnerships: Cultivating relationships with insurers and technology providers to innovate and improve services and processes.

Team Development: Acting as a mentor and coach to teams, promoting professional growth and a culture of excellence.

My passion lies in ensuring business continuity, overcoming operational challenges, and elevating customer satisfaction. I firmly believe in transparent communication, data integrity, and leading by example to inspire others to achieve their full potential.

Committed to driving organizations toward new milestones, I implement innovative strategies to ensure every part of the operational chain operates optimally. My objective is to continue contributing to the success of organizations by focusing on efficiency, quality, and sustainable growth."}

We believe in always being upfront and honest with our clients. That means as a client you may hear something you don’t like but one thing you won’t ever be able to say about us is that we weren’t honest and that we don’t have integrity. profile:
{"first_name": "Kevin", "last_name": "Wood", "full_name": "Kevin Wood", "headline": "Helping SMBs Find Flexible Financing Options To Drive Growth", "title": "President", "picture": {"source": "https://images.ai-ark.com/xo5Z2WL-5Hv12QodRnDyno9-EDYKOfBmyXtwhBno2lY/exp:1780358399/rs:fill:80:80/plain/s3://ark-person/images/2c65a1fa-eb25-8351-0f5b-e92e0768fa92.jpg"}, "background": {"source": "https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/C4D16AQECEv0MoYpBlA/profile-displaybackgroundimage-shrink_350_1400/profile-displaybackgroundimage-shrink_350_1400/0/1631734434918?e=1778716800&v=beta&t=f3ALFoh6NcBler1UzHNKInbTxTgrJJtgWHfSbNsgxKE"}, "birth_date": "1600-07-26", "summary": "Many businesses could use better cash flow. The problem is many businesses don’t fit their bank’s lending requirements even though their business is strong. 

They may lack hard assets, might be too new in business, or their customers pay them way too slow. And many businesses have exhausted getting loans from friends and family.  

This leaves businesses anxious about their ability to grow. They worry about being taken advantage of by nontraditional lenders who offer alternative financing. As they struggle with monthly expenses and payroll, they find themselves stuck with no apparent way out.   

At Flexent, we believe all businesses deserve financing that gives them greater opportunity to grow. That’s why for over 26 years, we’ve been providing businesses the support they need when they’ve run out of financing options. We help stabilize their operations and give them the flexibility to grow.

Flexent’s working capital products fit for businesses who are experiencing: 
- Expansion & Growth 
- Companies outpacing their tractional line of credit due to growth
- Recapitalization 
- Companies who’ve depleted their capital due to growth, or recovery from adverse macro or micro economic concerns
- Acquisition
- Turnarounds 
- Recovering from challenged financials
- Management buyouts  

Our Flexent Financing allows businesses to: 
✅ Access capital when they need it
✅ Keep 100% equity in their company
✅ Maintain consistent cash flow
✅ Have peace of mind knowing bills will get paid
✅ Do more business because they can finance
✅ Get financing backed by a bank
✅ Avoid crises that require cash flow 

Because a bank supports us, our nontraditional lending options bring bank-level service to businesses.  

How does it work?

Flexent helps businesses finance growth by looking at accounts receivables and inventory. We can unlock frozen assets by looking ahead at their future rather than their past.

Flexent can help businesses make that necessary hire, expand their product line, or take that next big step in their business evolution. 

As a division of Chesapeake Bank, Flexent is backed by the strength of a 121-year-old FDIC-insured institution offering flexible financing options to businesses since 1995. 

Schedule a call today if you are interested in having the freedom cash flow brings.

If you are a community bank interested in maintaining a valuable relationship with great businesses that don’t qualify for traditional lending, schedule a call with us today."}
